verses.text: “Tua hun ciangin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Judah gam kumpite' guhte, uliante' guhte, siampite' guhte, kamsangte' guhte leh Jerusalem khuamite' guhte a han sung uh panin kilakhia ding hi

Amaute in a it uh, a na a sepsak uh, a delh uh, a zon' uh leh a biak uh ahi ni leh kha leh vana om nate khempeuh mai-ah a kiphokhia ding hi. Tua guhte kikhawm nawnlo ding a, kiphum nawnlo ding hi. Leilaka ek kinusia bang ahi lel ding hi
Hih a gilo minamte' lakah a omlai sunteng in ka hawlkhiatna munah nuntak ding sangin sih ding a teelzaw ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in kong ci hi.
“Jeremiah aw, Topa in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in amaute kiangah va gen in. Mi khat a puk ciangin thokik buang hilo ahi hiam? Mi khat in lam a khialh ciangin hong kilehkik buang hilo ahi hiam
Tua ahih leh bang hangin hih mite lam khialin hong kilehkik nawnlo ahi uh hiam? Zuau pasian milimte lenkip uh a, hong kilehkik nuamlo uh hi
Amau' thugente ka ngaihsak a, kuamah in thuman genlo uh hi. A gitlohna uh panin kuamah kisiklo a, ‘Bang hih ka hi hiam?’ ci lel uh hi. Sakol galsim ding a tai bangin amau' tum ciatin a pai uh hi
Gun vapite nangawn in a lal hun ding thei uh a, sumkuangte, phialphiahte, leh gun vapite zong a hun ciangin hong tung zel uh hi. Ahih hangin ka mite in Topa' ngeina kipte a thei kei uh hi
Bangci bangin note in, ‘Ko ka pil uh a, Topa' thukham ka nei uh hi,’ ci thei ding na hi uh hiam? En un, thumanlo laitheite in tua thukham zuauthu a suah uh hi
Na mipilte uh maizum ding uh a, lungmangin a cihna ding a thei kei ding uh hi. En un, amaute in Topa' thu nial uh hi. Bang pilna nei nawn ahi uh hiam

Tua ahih manin a zite uh midangte ka piaksak ding a, a lote uh zong midangte ka luahsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neupen pan a lianpen dongin thumanlopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte-a kipan siampite dongin thumanlo khin uh hi
Amaute in ka mite' thuaknate thupi simsaklo uh a, hoihna a om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi

Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beeklo uh a, kisuangthei beeklo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site lak mahah amau zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawnkhia ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi

“ Topa in kong cihin-ah, amaute ka susia khin ding a, a lote uhah leenggah a om nawn kei ding hi. Thei in zong gah a nei nawn kei ding hi. A tehte nangawn keu ding a, amaute ka piaksa nate a bei ding uh hi

“Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Bang hangin tutu lai ihi hiam? Kikaikhawm un la khuapi muan'huaite va beel ni; tua lai-ah va si ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' tungah i mawh manin Topa i Pasian in eite a si dingin hong seh khinzo a, i dawn dingin gu tui hong pia khinzo hi
Nopna i zong a, nopna i ngah kei hi. Cidamna i lamen a, siatna bek i ngah hi
Leilu lam Dan khua pek panin galte' sakol nakging kiza hi. A sakol hatte' hamna awging in gamlelei lingsak hi. Amaute in i gam leh a sunga omteng, hong susia khin ding uh hi,’ a ci ding uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, note lakah gul kong khah ding hi. A kikhim zolo gul guneite kong khah ding a, note hong tu ding hi,” Topa in a ci hi.
Ka dahna dam theilo a, ka lungsim na mahmah hi

Ngai un, gamsung mun khempeuhah ka mite' tanute kap uh a, “Zion khua-ah Topa om nawnlo ahi hiam? A kumpipa uh om nawnlo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in dawngkik a, “Bang hangin milim bawltawmte leh a gamdang milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Mite in, “An kila khinzo a, khuakhal hun zong beita napi-in, eite hong kihon nailo lailai hi,” a ci uh hi
Ka mite' thuakna hangin ka lungsim kisia a, lungkham lua-in ka kap hi
Gilead-ah zatui omlo ahi hiam? Zato siam omlo ahi hiam? Bang hangin ka mite dam theilo ahi uh hiam?
